SOURCE: 52618188.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (52618188.pdf)
SUMMARY: IT professional with experience in help desk, quality assurance, and business operations. Skilled in Microsoft Windows, Office applications, SAP, CRM, and project management.
SKILLS: Microsoft Windows Operating Systems (95, 98, 2000, ME, XP, 7), Active Directory, Microsoft Works, Office, Outlook, SAP, CRM, ERP, Oracle, JD Edwards, Remedy, Great Plains, PeopleSoft, SharePoint, Avaya, Blue Pumpkin, Verint, Novell, VDI Platforms, Cognos, Business process improvement, cost-benefit analysis, forecasting and planning, advanced Excel modeling, business systems analysis, SAP Business requirements matrixes, project management, superb communication skills, advanced problem solving abilities, critical thinking, decisive, Quality assurance, compliance processes, process owner for document/record control, corrective/preventive action, internal auditing, KPI tracking, project management, team leadership, advanced Excel utilization, data extraction and analysis, report creation, metric management tools, strategic business solutions

SOURCE: 52618188.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Help Desk Specialist
COMPANY: Current Company Name
DATES: August 2014 - Present
DESCRIPTION: Diagnose and resolve technical issues, maintain customer records, document resolutions, and provide superior service in a fast-paced environment.

SOURCE: 52618188.pdf
JOB TITLE: Quality Assurance IT Analyst
COMPANY: Previous Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Established and implemented quality assurance processes, created reports using Excel, trained team members, and improved process metrics.

JOB TITLE: Business Operations Analyst / Metrics Analyst / Department Administrative Support / Supply Chain Assistant

DESCRIPTION: Provided detailed reporting, managed databases, and supported procurement activities.
